nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: I often use these AI models more for idea generation and suggestions

nodes.label: AI for repetitive simple tasks
nodes.grounding_span: things that would take a while to do manually, but AI can do reasonably well very quickly

nodes.label: AI accuracy and reliability in rephrasing
nodes.grounding_span: it did a fantastic job straight away, saving me hours of work. I still had to check everything

nodes.label: AI as threat to voiceover industry
nodes.label_negative: AI as benign tool for voiceover artists
nodes.grounding_span: the negative impact AI has had on many voiceover artists over the last few years

nodes.label: Client preference for authentic human voiceover
nodes.grounding_span: clients want a voiceover that sounds authentically human

nodes.label: AI for custom audio generation
nodes.grounding_span: it requires a human ear to identify what needs to be adjusted

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and human expression
nodes.grounding_span: I will manually do any final tweaks to get it perfect

nodes.label: Client trust and credibility
nodes.grounding_span: clients want a voiceover that sounds authentically human

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for wording tasks
nodes.grounding_span: it did a fantastic job straight away, saving me hours of work

nodes.label: Frustration with AI audio adjustment limitations
nodes.grounding_span: the AI tool's results may not be exactly as I wish

nodes.label: Ambivalence about AI's future role
nodes.grounding_span: I can understand that thinking due to the negative impact AI has had

nodes.label: Optimism about future niche AI tools
nodes.grounding_span: I'd hope that in the future, more niche tools will become available

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: I will provide some feedback to help refine the suggestions. Usually, once I have a suggestion that is close enough to what I want, I will manually do any final tweaks

nodes.label: Pragmatic tool selection based on effectiveness
nodes.grounding_span: I often use these AI models more for idea generation and suggestions. If it is something as straightforward as changing a single word, I may as well do that myself
